file_insights.lib/app/di/modules/auth_module.dart: Added TokenRefreshScheduler and TokenExpirationTracker registration for dependency injection
file_insights.lib/features/auth/presentation/providers: Updated AuthNotifier to accept TokenRefreshScheduler and AuthLocalDataSource as dependencies, added _startRefreshScheduler() and _stopRefreshScheduler() helper methods for lifecycle management
Added tokenRefreshSchedulerProvider and authLocalDataSourceProvider to connect the presentation layer with the scheduler service
file_insights.test/features/auth/integration/token_ref: Created comprehensive integration tests covering app lifecycle events (inactive, paused, hidden, foreground) and edge cases for token refresh scheduler

patterns_discovered: Dependency injection pattern for service registration in auth_module.dart
Observer pattern with WidgetsBindingObserver for app lifecycle monitoring
State management pattern using AsyncValue for auth state transitions
Lifecycle management pattern with start/stop/pause/resume methods
Provider pattern for dependency passing through widget tree
Error handling pattern with try-catch blocks in scheduler initialization
Session persistence pattern with AuthLocalDataSource for token storage
gotchas_discovered: App lifecycle events need proper handling: inactive/paused/hidden states should pause scheduler, foreground should resume
Session data completeness check before starting scheduler (all tokens and expiration must be present)
Scheduler disposal required to prevent memory leaks
Thread safety considerations when accessing local data source
Error propagation from scheduler initialization to auth state
Multiple state change handling (rapid pause/resume cycles)
Edge case handling for detached state (cleanup required)

approach_outcome.approach: Successfully integrated token refresh scheduler with app lifecycle events by implementing observer pattern, dependency injection, and comprehensive lifecycle management methods
approach_outcome.outcome: SUCCESS - All lifecycle events properly handled: pause on background, resume on foreground, stop on logout, comprehensive test coverage with 17 test groups covering all functionality
approach_outcome.technical_quality: High - Clean separation of concerns, proper error handling, comprehensive testing, follows Flutter best practices
approach_outcome.scalability: Good - Modular design allows easy extension of lifecycle events and scheduler behaviors

recommendations: Consider adding logging for lifecycle state changes to help with debugging
Implement retry logic for scheduler startup failures
Add metrics collection for scheduler performance monitoring
Consider adding configuration options for scheduler behavior tuning
Implement backup refresh strategy if primary scheduler fails
Add integration tests with actual app lifecycle state changes beyond unit tests
Consider adding telemetry for refresh success/failure rates
